meta.title: Inner Hunt — Mindful Color Hunt
meta.description: Discover your mood, find your color, and reflect with today's Divine Name.

intro.title: Inner Hunt
intro.description: Discover your mood, find your color, and embark on a deep contemplation journey with one of the Divine Names.

color.title: Which color calls out to you?

number.title: Choose a number from within
number.hint: Each number corresponds to a Divine Name…

1.tefekkur: Today, see Allah's infinite mercy in the soft, warm colors around you. Every pink object is a reflection of His compassion.

2.tefekkur: Try to see Ar-Rahman and Ar-Raheem in the objects around you colored with compassion. Every gentle touch is a manifestation of His mercy.

3.tefekkur: Behold the majesty of divine sovereignty in dark, deep colors. Every black object can be a reflection of His absolute power.

8.tefekkur: Contemplate the power of Al-Aziz in strong, dark tones. His honor can never be broken.

10.tefekkur: Search for the secrets of divine majesty in the depth of black. True greatness belongs only to Him.

13.tefekkur: Watch how color and form are shaped in blue tones. Every color transition is a manifestation of His creative art.

15.tefekkur: Feel the absolute power of Al-Qahhar in deep dark tones. All obstacles melt before Him.

18.tefekkur: Imagine closed doors opening in green and vivid tones. When an obstacle is lifted today, remember Al-Fattah.

19.tefekkur: See the knowledge of Al-Alim in every detail of vivid colors. From the veins of a leaf to a butterfly's wing, everything is known.

24.tefekkur: Watch the miracle of life in different shades of green. Everything that sprouts from a seed and moves with a breath is a manifestation of His giving life.

29.tefekkur: Think about the balanced union of love and justice in pink tones. True justice is incomplete without mercy.

31.tefekkur: Think about the invisible subtle blessings in light blue tones. Sometimes the greatest gifts come in moments we don't notice.

33.tefekkur: Feel patience and dignity in calm blue tones. Al-Halim does not rush; everything happens at the most beautiful time.

34.tefekkur: Feel the peace of forgiveness and renewal in soft pinks. A new page opens each day.

35.tefekkur: Look at the blue sky and unite the feeling of gratitude for every breath you take today with that blue.

39.tefekkur: Think about every living being being nourished in deep tones. No existence is left without sustenance.

47.tefekkur: Feel the two-way flow of love in pink tones. Al-Wadud both loves and is loved; love comes from Him and returns to Him.

48.tefekkur: See abundance and blessing in yellow and orange tones. Every ray of sunlight is a symbol of Al-Majid's generosity.

50.tefekkur: While looking at blue tones, pause and say 'He sees.' Every color exists under His witness.

52.tefekkur: Feel the permanence of truth in blue and deep tones. Everything is temporary; only Al-Haqq is eternal.

55.tefekkur: See Al-Matin in the resilience of green, in the trunks of mountains and trees. Strength belongs only to Him.

81.tefekkur: Think about the preservation of balance in vivid colors. Every injustice will be corrected; balance is a divine law.

83.tefekkur: Imagine a gentle touch in soft pink tones. Ar-Rauf's kindness envelops without intimidating, without breaking.

88.tefekkur: Think about the divine richness that needs nothing in the depths of black. His treasures never deplete.

95.tefekkur: Behold the unique creativity of Al-Badi in the variety of colors around you. Even two different shades of the same color are a miracle of His art.

4.tefekkur: Sometimes we feel broken. Al-Quddus cleanses all imperfections and hurts. Watch the tranquility in muted colors today and ask Him for inner purification.

5.tefekkur: Despite the storms within, As-Salam grants peace to the heart. Contemplate His hand of peace extending to you in the quietest textures around you.

6.tefekkur: When you feel fear and anxiety, remember the refuge of Al-Mu'min. Find the sense of security He gives in the reflection of calm waters.

7.tefekkur: In moments of loneliness, Al-Muhaymin descends. Feel that you are under His watch, just like the sky covering you, and relax.

9.tefekkur: Great power is sometimes hidden within fragility. Al-Jabbar mends the broken and strengthens the weak. Look at upright trees and surrender to His restorative power.

11.tefekkur: When feeling depleted, hold on to the renewing creativity of Al-Khaliq. There is constant rebirth in the universe; you too are created anew with every breath.

14.tefekkur: When bearing regret, remember the infinite pardon of Al-Ghaffar. Just as falling rain washes dirt away, His forgiveness lightens the soul.

16.tefekkur: Exhaustion arises from struggling alone. Open your heart to the unearned gifts of Al-Wahhab. A flower growing effortlessly in nature is an example of His unconditional giving.

17.tefekkur: Tear away the anxiety of material or spiritual lack. The blessing of Ar-Razzaq comes from unseen sources. Contemplate a small bird's search for its daily sustenance.

21.tefekkur: When your chest feels tight, seek refuge in the relief of Al-Basit. Look at open horizons and the boundless sky, requesting the expansion of your heart.

23.tefekkur: When you feel you are falling, Ar-Rafi' offers hope. Observe the sapling that reaches its branches to the sky, even if its roots are at the very bottom of the earth.

26.tefekkur: In silent moments when you think no one hears you, As-Sami' hears even your whisper. Entrust your most secret inner prayer to Him.

27.tefekkur: It brings peace to know you are watched while struggling in difficulties. Al-Basir sees both your tears and your effort. Contemplate His vision in the clarity of water.

36.tefekkur: When worldly affairs tire you, Al-Aliyy calls you to the grand perspective. Look up, notice how small troubles shrink in the sublime landscape.

99.tefekkur: In the heaviness that waiting brings, As-Sabur is your greatest support. Look at the fruit ripening slowly in its own time and understand the beauty of patience.

pwa.installTitle: Add Inner Hunt to your home screen
pwa.iosHint: Tap the share icon in Safari and select 'Add to Home Screen'

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Inner Hunt application.
privacy.label: Legal
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: Inner Hunt does not collect personal data from its users. There is no requirement to create an account, log in, or share any personal information. The app can be used completely anonymously.

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.content: To improve your experience, your selections (mood, color, number) are stored only in your device's local storage (sessionStorage). This data is not sent to our servers and is deleted when the browser session ends.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.content: Vercel Analytics is used for usage statistics. This service does not collect personal data, does not use cookies, and does not store your IP address. Only anonymous, aggregated usage data is collected.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.content: Our mobile app sends daily local notifications with your permission. These notifications are generated entirely on your device and no data is transmitted to any server. You can revoke notification permissions at any time from your device settings.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: No third-party services are used beyond Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights. Font files are loaded from Google Fonts servers, but no personal data is shared in this process.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Inner Hunt is suitable for all age groups. No personal data is knowingly collected from children under the age of 13.

changes.title: Changes
changes.content: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be published on this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about our privacy policy, you can contact us at contact@innerhunt.com.
